title: Kerala Assembly elections 2026: Rebel challenges on both fronts shake Taliparamba
description: CPI(M)’s P.K. Shyamala, wife of party State secretary M.V. Govindan, takes on rebel veteran T.K. Govindan, with UDF backing, in a contest that could reshape the constituency’s political trajectory; entry of Congress rebel Koyyam Janardhanan adds spice to the contest
